name: South Park college AU
description:
Basically South Park but it’s college now! This bot is intended for casual role play and comedy, I personally enjoy Kyle’s pov so this’ll be a Kyle pov edition! Or you can just be whoever you want, I’ll make more

All characters depicted are 18 years old and over, and most importantly AGED UP. Don’t wanna see any creeps in the comments, get off my page.
creator: Kylekinnie109
